name: btp-drawio-skill
description: A Claude Code plugin that authors SAP Architecture Center / BTP solution diagrams as draw.io files — Horizon palette, grey-circle icons, L0-L2 level conventions, template selection, corpus scoring, validation, and autofix.

plugins.name: sap-architecture
plugins.description: Generate, validate, score, and autofix SAP / BTP / on-prem architecture diagrams as .drawio files following the official SAP BTP Solution Diagram Guidelines. Bundles 100 SAP BTP service icons, 448 indexed SAP draw.io starter-kit assets, and 63 SAP reference templates.
